headline: Warner, Schiff probe potential insider trading in government
summary: The lawmakers also cited a recent report that a Pete Hegseth-linked broker sought to make a multimillion-dollar investment in a defense-linked ETF in February.

headline: CFTC sues Arizona, Connecticut, Illinois over prediction market regulation
summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission said it was suing Arizona, Connecticut and Illinois over its ability to exclusively regulate prediction markets.

raw.headline: CFTC sues Arizona, Connecticut, Illinois over prediction market regulation
raw.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission said it was suing Arizona, Connecticut and Illinois over its ability to exclusively regulate prediction markets.

headline: Is the Stock Market Open Today? Here Are the Trading Hours Ahead of Good Friday.
summary: Here’s what to know about trading hours for Thursday and Good Friday.  Is the Stock Market Open Today and on Good Friday?  The New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq Stock Market will be open on Thursday and closed on Friday.

raw.headline: Is the Stock Market Open Today? Here Are the Trading Hours Ahead of Good Friday.

headline: Assessing Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Valuation After New CNBC Options Education Partnership
summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) is in focus after announcing a multi year collaboration with CNBC that will bring daily programming to its Chicago trading floor, highlighting rising options interest and Cboe’s role in investor education. See our latest analysis for Cboe Global Markets. The CNBC collaboration lands after a mixed few months for the stock, with a recent 30 day share price return of 5.78% contrasting with an 11.67% 90 day gain and a 26.26% 1 year total shareholder return. This...
